annotations.description: Horizontal cell content alignment. Currently, must be one of 'left', 'center', or 'right'.
annotations.html_description: Horizontal cell content alignment. Currently, must be one of “left”, “center”, or “right”.
annotations.rst_description: Horizontal cell content alignment. Currently, must be one of 'left', 'center', or 'right'.
annotations.name: align

annotations.description: Vertical cell content alignment. Currently, must be one of 'top', 'middle', or 'bottom'.
annotations.html_description: Vertical cell content alignment. Currently, must be one of “top”, “middle”, or “bottom”.
annotations.rst_description: Vertical cell content alignment. Currently, must be one of 'top', 'middle', or 'bottom'.
annotations.name: valign

annotations.description: Text in the cell. If omitted, then the cell is invisible.
annotations.html_description: Optional. Text in the cell. If omitted, then the cell is invisible.
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Text in the cell. If omitted, then the cell is invisible.
annotations.name: text

annotations.description: True, if the cell is a header cell
annotations.html_description: Optional. True, if the cell is a header cell
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. :code:`True`, if the cell is a header cell
annotations.name: is_header

annotations.description: The number of columns the cell spans if it is bigger than 1
annotations.html_description: Optional. The number of columns the cell spans if it is bigger than 1
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. The number of columns the cell spans if it is bigger than 1
annotations.name: colspan

annotations.description: The number of rows the cell spans if it is bigger than 1
annotations.html_description: Optional. The number of rows the cell spans if it is bigger than 1
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. The number of rows the cell spans if it is bigger than 1
annotations.name: rowspan
